title: Pretzel's Foods
description: A mod that adds new foods to Minecraft.
body:
This mod adds some foods to Minecraft for example:

Pretzel, Hot-Dog, Sausage, Ice-Cream

and also adds some drinks:

Soda

and more when I get to it.

and here are some recipes:

Dough Recipe

![Dough Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b71e902702b581a92b213822b645929d46e6a135.png)

Hot-Dog Bun Recipe
